query: SELECT pName, SUM(qty) FROM WP_M09.dbo.WP_vTransfer WHERE isDel='N' AND dtlIsDel='N' GROUP BY pName

query: SELECT TOP 1 fWhName, COUNT(DISTINCT TransferId) AS cnt FROM WP_M09.dbo.WP_vTransfer WHERE isDel='N' AND dtlIsDel='N' GROUP BY fWhName ORDER BY cnt DESC

query: SELECT pName, COUNT(DISTINCT TransferId) AS cnt FROM WP_M09.dbo.WP_vTransfer WHERE isDel='N' AND dtlIsDel='N' AND pName IS NOT NULL GROUP BY pName HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT TransferId) > 3
question: List products transferred more than 3 times.

query: SELECT TransferId, pName, costAvg FROM WP_M09.dbo.WP_vTransfer WHERE isDel='N' AND dtlIsDel='N' AND costAvg > (SELECT AVG(costAvg) FROM WP_M09.dbo.WP_vTransfer WHERE isDel='N' AND dtlIsDel='N')

query: SELECT TOP 1 LEFT(TransferId,6) AS mon, COUNT(DISTINCT TransferId) AS cnt FROM WP_M09.dbo.WP_vTransfer WHERE isDel='N' GROUP BY LEFT(TransferId,6) ORDER BY cnt DESC

query: SELECT TOP 3 pName, SUM(qty) AS totalQty FROM WP_M09.dbo.WP_vTransfer WHERE isDel='N' AND dtlIsDel='N' GROUP BY pName ORDER BY totalQty DESC
question: Show the top 3 products by total quantity transferred.

query: SELECT fWhName, COUNT(DISTINCT pNo) AS productCount FROM WP_M09.dbo.WP_vTransfer WHERE isDel='N' AND dtlIsDel='N' GROUP BY fWhName HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT pNo) > 2
